reasoning: The US Fiscal Year 2025 runs from October 1, 2024, to September 30, 2025. About 4 months of the fiscal year will have passed before any new Trump administration tariffs can realistically be implemented. Achieving over $500 billion in customs duties within the remaining ~8 months would require an annualized revenue collection rate of over $700 billion. Given total US goods imports are ~$3.1 trillion, this would necessitate a universal effective tariff rate of >20% immediately applied to all imports, assuming no drop in import volume. Such unprecedented and rapid implementation is virtually impossible due to administrative lags, legal challenges, exemptions, and the inevitable demand destruction. The market price (freeze value) reflects this at 0.002 (0.2%). I will forecast 2%.
